title: The Pinarello Dogma X Is an Incredible Race Bike With an Identity Crisis
summary:
Forget the endurance or all-road label. By combining WorldTour stiffness with real-world geometry and tire clearance, Pinarello created a road bike that makes you wonder why the race bike still exists.

Read the full article at The Pinarello Dogma X Is an Incredible Race Bike With an Identity Crisis on Velo.
